description: Generate and review coding-agent plans as structured visual documents with diagrams, wireframes, prototypes, annotations, share links, feedback, and HTML export.

auth.setup: Install with the Agent-Native CLI to add the /visual-plan, /visual-recap, /ui-plan, /prototype-plan, /plan-design, and /visual-questions skills plus the Plans MCP connector. Plans use the app session for scoped storage and review; Google sign-in is available when OAuth env vars are configured.

surfaces.description: Create or open an Agent-Native visual plan for a coding-agent task.
Create a visual recap plan from a PR, commit, branch, or git diff for high-altitude review.
Create a UI-first Agent-Native plan with an optional top pan/zoom wireframe canvas and a refined rich document below.
Create a prototype-first Agent-Native plan with a functional live prototype above the document.
Create a full-fidelity Agent-Native design plan with a Design canvas tab and optional matching Prototype tab.
Create a rich visual intake questionnaire for explicit /visual-questions workflows.
